'''âh-sh-n''' ('''kahashan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyb|dyb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyb|dyb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kahashan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihashan|thihashan]] || [[word:jihashan|jihashan]] || [[word:shihashan|shihashan]] || [[word:kihashan|kihashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhashan|thuthuhashan]] || [[word:jujuhashan|jujuhashan]] || [[word:shushuhashan|shushuhashan]] || [[word:kukuhashan|kukuhashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhashan|thuhashan]] || [[word:juhashan|juhashan]] || [[word:shuhashan|shuhashan]] || [[word:kuhashan|kuhashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhashan|thuhashan]] || [[word:juhashan|juhashan]] || [[word:shuhashan|shuhashan]] || [[word:kuhashan|kuhashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehashan|thehashan]] || [[word:jehashan|jehashan]] || [[word:shehashan|shehashan]] || [[word:kehashan|kehashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohashan|thothohashan]] || [[word:jojohashan|jojohashan]] || [[word:shoshohashan|shoshohashan]] || [[word:kokohashan|kokohashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohashan|thohashan]] || [[word:johashan|johashan]] || [[word:shohashan|shohashan]] || [[word:kohashan|kohashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohashan|thohashan]] || [[word:johashan|johashan]] || [[word:shohashan|shohashan]] || [[word:kohashan|kohashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhashan|thĂŠhashan]] || [[word:jĂŠhashan|jĂŠhashan]] || [[word:shĂŠhashan|shĂŠhashan]] || [[word:kĂŠhashan|kĂŠhashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahashan|thathahashan]] || [[word:jajahashan|jajahashan]] || [[word:shashahashan|shashahashan]] || [[word:kakahashan|kakahashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahashan|thahashan]] || [[word:jahashan|jahashan]] || [[word:shahashan|shahashan]] || [[word:kahashan|kahashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahashan|thahashan]] || [[word:jahashan|jahashan]] || [[word:shahashan|shahashan]] || [[word:kahashan|kahashan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahashan|shahashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahashan|goshahashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahashan|gokishahashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahashanĂŒ|shahashanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahashanknĂŒ|goshahashanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashanĂŒ|gokishahashanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahashanshĂ«|shahashanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahashankshĂ«|goshahashankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahashanshĂ«|gokishahashanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashanro|shahashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashankro|goshahashankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashanro|gokishahashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashanmu|shahashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashankmu|goshahashankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashanmu|gokishahashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahashansher|shahashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahashanksher|goshahashanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahashansher|gokishahashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahashang|shahashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahashankng|goshahashankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahashang|gokishahashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahashanya|shahashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahashankya|goshahashankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahashanya|gokishahashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahashanyam|shahashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahashankyam|goshahashankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahashanyam|gokishahashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashanĂŒshĂ«|shahashanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashanknĂŒshĂ«|goshahashanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashanĂŒshĂ«|gokishahashanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashanĂŒro|shahashanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashanknĂŒro|goshahashanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashanĂŒro|gokishahashanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashanĂŒmu|shahashanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashanknĂŒmu|goshahashanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashanĂŒmu|gokishahashanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashanshĂ«nĂŒ|shahashanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshahashankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishahashanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashanshĂ«ro|shahashanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashankshĂ«ro|goshahashankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashanshĂ«ro|gokishahashanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashanshĂ«mu|shahashanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashankshĂ«mu|goshahashankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashanshĂ«mu|gokishahashanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashanronĂŒ|shahashanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashankronĂŒ|goshahashankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashanronĂŒ|gokishahashanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashanroshĂ«|shahashanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashankroshĂ«|goshahashankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashanroshĂ«|gokishahashanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahashanromu|shahashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahashankromu|goshahashankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahashanromu|gokishahashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahashanmunĂŒ|shahashanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahashankmunĂŒ|goshahashankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahashanmunĂŒ|gokishahashanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahashanmushĂ«|shahashanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahashankmushĂ«|goshahashankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahashanmushĂ«|gokishahashanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahashanmuro|shahashanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahashankmuro|goshahashankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahashanmuro|gokishahashanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
